info.name: WDC Club Backend API
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for the WDC Club backend.

Workflow:
1. Run 'Health Check' to verify server is up.
2. Use 'Google OAuth (Browser)' instructions to get a JWT token.
3. Paste the JWT into the collection variable `jwt_token`.
4. For admin routes, paste an admin JWT into `admin_token`.
5. After 'Get All Users', the first student's `user_id` is auto-saved.
6. After 'Create Assignment', the `assignment_id` variable is auto-saved.
7. After 'Create Announcement', the `announcement_id` variable is auto-saved.

variable.description: Base URL for the API. Change port if needed.
JWT token for a regular student. Paste here after Google OAuth login.
JWT token for an admin user. Paste here after Google OAuth login as admin.
MongoDB _id of a student user. Auto-set by 'Get All Users' test script.
MongoDB _id of an assignment. Auto-set by 'Create Assignment' test script.
MongoDB _id of an assignment with a past deadline. Auto-set by the expired assignment create request.
MongoDB _id of an announcement. Auto-set by 'Create Announcement' test script.

request.description: Verify the server is running. Returns { status: 'ok', message: 'WDC Server is running' }.

BROWSER ONLY — Paste this URL into a browser:
http://localhost:5000/api/auth/google

After successful Google login with an @nitp.ac.in account, you will receive a JSON response containing a JWT `token`. Copy it and paste into the `jwt_token` collection variable. For admin testing, login with an admin account and paste into `admin_token`.

exec: // Cannot complete OAuth in Postman — requires browser redirect.
// 2. Copy the 'token' from the JSON response.
// 3. Paste into the collection variable 'jwt_token' (or 'admin_token' for admins).
pm.test('INFO: Open in browser to complete OAuth', function () {

request.description: Quick way to verify a JWT is valid. Returns the logged-in user's profile and auto-saves user_id.
Returns the full profile of the authenticated user, including profileCompletion score.

exec: pm.test('User profile contains required fields', function () {

request.description: Fills 3 of 5 tracked fields (mobileNumber, githubLink, linkedinLink). profileCompletion should equal 60.

body.raw:
{
  "mobileNumber": "9876543210",
  "githubLink": "https://github.com/nitp-student",
  "linkedinLink": "https://linkedin.com/in/nitp-student",
  "resumeLink": "https://drive.google.com/file/d/abc123",
  "about": "Final year CSE student at NIT Patna passionate about full-stack web development."
}

request.description:
Fills all 5 tracked fields. profileCompletion should equal 100.
Tracked fields: mobileNumber, githubLink, linkedinLink, resumeLink, about.
Returns the applicationStatus of the logged-in user: pending | shortlisted | rejected.

exec: pm.test('applicationStatus is a valid enum', function () {

request.description: Admin-only. Returns all registered users. Auto-saves first student's _id to `user_id` variable.

exec: // Auto-save first student _id for approve/reject tests

request.description: Admin-only. Sets applicationStatus to 'shortlisted'. After this, the student can access assignments.
Admin-only. Sets applicationStatus to 'rejected'.
Admin-only. Creates a new assignment with a future deadline. The `assignment_id` is auto-saved.
Creates an assignment with a past deadline. The `expired_assignment_id` is auto-saved for the deadline test.

header.description: Must be a shortlisted student's token

request.description: Only accessible to users with applicationStatus === 'shortlisted'. Returns 403 otherwise.

header.description: Use a token for a user with applicationStatus 'pending' or 'rejected'

request.description: Expects 403 when the authenticated user is NOT shortlisted. Switch jwt_token to a non-shortlisted user before running.

header.description: Must be a shortlisted student's token

request.description: Submit an assignment. Requires shortlisted status and a non-expired deadline.
Re-submitting the same assignment should return 409 Conflict with 'Assignment already submitted'.
Uses `expired_assignment_id` (set by the expired assignment create request). Expects 400 with 'Submission deadline has passed'.
Admin-only. Deletes the assignment referenced by `assignment_id` variable.
Admin-only. Creates a new announcement. The `announcement_id` is auto-saved.
Visible to all authenticated users (students and admins). Returns all announcements.
Admin-only. Deletes the announcement referenced by `announcement_id` variable.
Hitting a protected route with no Authorization header should return 401.
A malformed or invalid JWT should return 401 Unauthorized via the global error middleware.
A student JWT hitting the admin-only GET /users should return 403 Forbidden.

exec: pm.test('Access denied message mentions admin', function () {

request.description: Any unknown route is caught by notFoundMiddleware and returns 404.
A malformed MongoDB ObjectId triggers a CastError, which errorMiddleware converts to a 400 Bad Request.
